conflicts.description: Large static data file has been touched by recent blind-box workflows and is easy to mis-review during a full 20-scene rewrite.
conflicts.strategy: Plan data rewrite as a single sequential implementation task after rules/tests are established; do not parallelize edits to this file.
conflicts.impact: Lower merge/conflict risk and easier review of all 20 scene_expansion_items lists.

conflicts.description: New quality checks must extend existing structural tests without destabilizing current compatibility assertions.
conflicts.strategy: Plan test additions before data rewrite, using existing unittest style and explicit allow/deny semantics.
conflicts.impact: Creates a clear failing target before or alongside the data rewrite.

conflicts.description: Stable docs must be updated only after data and tests settle, and must remain concise.
conflicts.strategy: Plan docs as final task after tests pass; update Game content extraction/agents.md first, then check root agents.md, README.md, and .gitignore.
conflicts.impact: Avoids duplicating temporary spec detail in stable repository entry docs.

conflicts.description: Working tree contains untracked workflow/spec/team directories from current and adjacent planning work.
conflicts.strategy: Do not clean, stage, or overwrite unrelated workflow artifacts in implementation tasks.
